description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 2 / section 8. Gap markers and session-phase organization**.

Goal: add lightweight session-phase markers for major workflow transitions such as research → implementation, implementation → testing, or blocked → resumed.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/prompts.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/format.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/types.ts`

Worker notes:
- phase markers should improve readability without becoming a full thread-management system
- keep the markers stable enough to coexist with cache-friendly layout work
- prefer a small vocabulary and deterministic rendering
title: Add lightweight session-phase markers for major workflow transitions
